wardrobe.default: Friendly cream-white helper robot with AITX orange (#ff4201) accent seams, kind glowing screen-face, orange open-arms mark on chest, open-arms welcoming posture.

structured.promptCraft: The AITX brand agent, personified: a soulful helper mascot. Illustrated in the same comic style as gabr-michael / gabr-gary. Pass gabr-aitx-agent on every render. Arms open, echoing the AITX open-arms mark.
